description_long: This is a rectangular picnic table with two long benches attached on either side, constructed from planks arranged parallel to the length of the table. The tabletop and benches are supported by a robust wooden frame, featuring diagonal braces and crossbeams for stability. The surface is covered in a colorful, grid-patterned texture with large numbers, giving it a playful and modern appearance. The benches are integrated into the main structure, ensuring they remain securely attached and aligned with the tabletop. The table is elevated by four sturdy legs, each reinforced by angled supports. There is no visible hole in the center of the tabletop for an umbrella.
description: A colorful, rectangular picnic table with attached benches and a sturdy wooden support frame, featuring a grid-patterned surface with large numbers.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the tabletop and both benches, with the supporting legs and braces visible underneath.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the table and benches, as well as the diagonal support braces beneath the tabletop.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the tabletop and benches from the opposite side, with leg supports visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the table's length and the structural supports beneath the benches and tabletop.
attribute_tabletop_support_structure: The tabletop is supported by four sturdy legs connected by horizontal crossbeams and diagonal braces, providing stability and strength to the structure.
